tools.name: keyword_research
tools.description: Research keyword volume, difficulty, CPC, trends, and related keywords

tools.name: check_ranking
tools.description: Check where a domain ranks for a specific keyword in Google top 100

tools.name: serp_snapshot
tools.description: Get top 10 Google results for a keyword with SERP features

tools.name: domain_overview
tools.description: Domain SEO overview: organic keywords, traffic estimate, position distribution

tools.name: content_score
tools.description: Analyze URL for on-page SEO quality: score, readability, technical checks, recommendations

tools.name: competitor_gap
tools.description: Find keywords your competitor ranks for — identify content gaps and opportunities

tools.name: title_optimizer
tools.description: Analyze current title tag and generate SEO-optimized title suggestions

tools.name: meta_generator
tools.description: Analyze and generate optimized meta title + description for a URL

tools.name: heading_analysis
tools.description: Analyze H1-H4 heading structure of a page with SEO recommendations

tools.name: rank_tracker
tools.description: Track ranking positions for multiple keywords at once (max 10)

tools.name: serp_alert
tools.description: Check current SERP position and compare against previous check — tracks changes over time

tools.name: backlink_check
tools.description: Check backlinks and referring domains for a domain (requires Backlinks subscription)

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Server health, version, tool status, and API connectivity
